response.overview: To Be Determined - We’re a small independent team of 20+ creators brought together by  a shared interest in storytelling and horror. We are all currently working  on a grounded reimagining of the Five Nights at Freddy’s universe.  The project is a movie being directed and animated in Blender,  with a focus on a more psychological tone as well as horror.  What started as a few ideas has grown into a talented cast,  as well as a team of amazing animators
response.title: Five Nights Rewritten
